entities.description: The crop being studied for drought tolerance and aflatoxin resistance

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of peanut genotypes to maintain productivity and health under water-deficit conditions

entities.description: The presence of Aflatoxin B1 in peanuts resulting from fungal infestation

entities.description: The fungus responsible for colonization and aflatoxin contamination in peanuts

entities.description: The geographical region where resistant peanut varieties are intended for development and use

entities.description: The research facility where the peanut genotype experiments were conducted

entities.name: WATER STRESS
entities.description: Intermittent water-deficit regime imposed at the pod filling stage

entities.name: WELL-WATERED CONDITIONS
entities.description: The control condition with adequate water supply

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The quantity and components of pods produced per plant

entities.name: AFLATOXIN RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of peanut genotypes to resist Aspergillus flavus infestation and subsequent aflatoxin contamination

entities.name: SEED COAT TOTAL POLYPHENOL
entities.description: Biochemical compounds in the seed coat associated with resistance to aflatoxin

entities.name: NUMBER OF IMMATURE PODS PER PLANT
entities.description: A specific component of pod yield measured during the study
